http://localhost:5173.tag: <input data-cy="job-tracker-company" placeholder="e.g., Zalando" value="" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221);">
<input data-cy="job-tracker-title" placeholder="e.g., Junior Frontend Developer" value="" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221);">
<input data-cy="job-tracker-location" placeholder="Berlin / Remote" value="" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221);">
<input data-cy="job-tracker-url" placeholder="https://..." value="" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221);">

http://localhost:5173.selector: [placeholder="What did you apply with? Who is the contact person? Next steps?"]
http://localhost:5173.tag: <textarea data-cy="job-tracker-notes" placeholder="What did you apply with? Who is the contact person? Next steps?" rows="3" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); resize: vertical;"></textarea>

<input data-cy="job-tracker-search" placeholder="Search company, title, location, notes..." value="" style="padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); min-width: 260px; flex: 1 1 0%;">
